untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern and Head-and-Shoulders top identification require visual pattern recognition (shape/structure detection) which cannot be expressed using the allowed indicators and operators. The signal requires identifying specific chart formations with marked shoulders, head, and symmetry properties that are not available in the technical indicator set. Entry conditions specify 'Pattern formation identified' and 'Pattern may qualify as head-and-shoulders top' which are pattern-recognition tasks, not quantifiable technical conditions. Exit target uses 'measure rule' which is pattern-dependent and not translatable to indicator logic.
translation_notes: Pattern-based signals cannot be mechanically encoded without custom pattern-detection logic. The volume conditions (high breakout volume with tepid succeeding days, right shoulder volume diminished vs left shoulder) are approximated but do not capture the full pattern requirement. Stop-loss and hold period set to conservative defaults. This signal requires a custom pattern-matching module outside the indicator-based backtest engine.
